description.zh: 优雅的小猎手，人类最受欢迎的伙伴之一
description.en: Elegant little hunters, one of humanity's most popular companions

description.zh: 人类最忠实的伙伴，永远的好朋友
description.en: Humanity's most loyal companion, forever friend

description.zh: 毛茸茸的小可爱，吃货中的战斗机
长寿的智慧老人，背着自己的房子到处走
description.en: Wise elders of longevity, carrying their homes everywhere

description.zh: 神秘又酷炫的冷血朋友，比你想象的更温柔
description.en: Mysterious and cool cold-blooded friends, gentler than you think

description.zh: 八条腿的小艺术家，织网界的顶级工程师
description.en: Eight-legged little artists, top engineers of web-weaving

description.zh: 会唱歌的小精灵，天空中的彩色朋友
description.en: Singing little sprites, colorful friends of the sky

description.zh: 圆滚滚的毛球，腮帮子可以塞下整个世界
description.en: Round little furballs with cheeks that can hold the whole world

description.zh: 水中的精灵，游来游去的小艺术家
description.en: Spirits of the water, swimming little artists

description.zh: 活化石级别的酷酷大佬，远古时代的霸主
description.en: Cool boss-level living fossils, overlords of ancient times

description.zh: 冷面小王子，断尾求生的战术大师
description.en: Cool little princes, tactical masters of tail-loss survival

description.zh: 会唱歌的小绿球，蚊子的终极天敌
description.en: Singing little green balls, the ultimate nemesis of mosquitoes
